overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a character in a green robe exploring a snowy village at night. The character enters a stone cottage, interacts with an NPC by the fireplace, traverses the warm interior, and exits to a waterfront dock area.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy village street with stone cottages

agents.ego_description: walking through the snowy village street toward a stone cottage entrance

entered.detail: stone house with warm lit windows and snow-covered roof
wooden cart with barrels parked beside the house
large rocky mountain formation in the background

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a quiet snowy village at night, approaching a stone cottage with warm light glowing from the windows. The ground is covered in snow and a wooden cart sits to the right of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: cozy cottage interior with stone fireplace

events.description: entering the stone cottage from the snowy exterior
stopping at the fireplace to interact with the seated NPC

agents.ego_description: entering the house and approaching the NPC working by the stone fireplace

notable_agents.action: seated by the fireplace working on a crafting activity

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with burning fire and cooking implements
wooden door frame leading into the house
lit wall-mounted lanterns providing warm light
wooden shelf above the fireplace with pots and decorations

segments.scene_description: The character enters the warm cottage interior, leaving the snowy night behind. The room is illuminated by a stone fireplace where an NPC sits working. The character approaches and stands near the fireplace, interacting with the seated figure.

scene_state.functional_zone: cottage interior hallway and back room with hanging lanterns

events.description: turning away from the fireplace and walking deeper into the house
opening the rear door to exit the house

agents.ego_description: walking through the interior rooms toward the back exit

entered.detail: paper lanterns hanging from the ceiling beams
wooden door leading to the exterior

segments.scene_description: Leaving the fireplace behind, the character explores the deeper rooms of the cottage, passing under hanging lanterns and alongside furniture. The character approaches and opens the rear door, revealing the snowy exterior.

events.description: exiting the house to the snowy waterfront area
approaching another character standing on the dock

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden dock by the water, passing another character

notable_agents.action: standing on the dock then walking ahead toward the water

entered.detail: stone door frame of the rear exit
wooden plank dock extending over the water
calm water reflecting the night sky
stone walls and ruins along the dock side

segments.scene_description: The character exits to a snowy waterfront area, walking along a wooden dock beside calm water. Another character stands ahead on the dock near a small fire. The scene is dark with snow-covered rocks and trees surrounding the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cold, snowy village night into the warmth of a stone cottage before returning to a dark waterfront. It begins by following a character in a green robe through a quiet, snow-covered village path past a wooden cart toward a cottage glowing with interior light. As the character steps inside, the scene shifts from the freezing night to a warm interior illuminated by a stone fireplace where a seated NPC works. The camera then moves deeper into the cottage, passing under hanging lanterns and alongside furniture before the character opens a rear door to reveal the winter air once more. Finally, the movement leads out onto a wooden dock beside calm water, where the environment opens up to show snow-covered rocks and a distant figure standing by a small fire.
